groups.name: Engineering
groups.description: Build, maintain, and ship the OpenClaw stack.

groups.name: Intelligence Lab
groups.description: Research workflows, benchmarks, and knowledge capture.

groups.name: Personal OS
groups.description: Life operations, memory, health, and wealth execution.

boards.name: Developer Board
boards.perspective: Prioritize maintainability, testability, and clear ownership.
boards.objective: Ship stable weekly releases with automated QA.

boards.name: Researcher Board
boards.description: Research planning, experiments, and evidence logs.
boards.perspective: Prefer measurable experiments and cite reproducible evidence.
boards.objective: Run high-value experiments and publish actionable findings.

boards.name: Life Memory Board
boards.description: Personal assistant operating board for routines and memory.
boards.perspective: Turn intentions into routines and keep memory retrieval fast.
boards.objective: Maintain reliable daily routines and life memory snapshots.

boards.name: Health Assistant Board
boards.description: Health habits, metrics, and check-in workflows.
boards.perspective: Track trends, not one-off noise, and favor consistency.
boards.objective: Keep weekly health actions consistent and measurable.

boards.name: Wealth Maker Board
boards.description: Portfolio review, stock analysis, and wealth strategy.
boards.perspective: Focus on risk-adjusted decisions and long-term discipline.
boards.objective: Build repeatable investment review and execution cycles.

tags.name: Personal
tags.description: Personal assistant and life management tasks.

group_memory.content: Ship small, test before merge, and keep rollback paths clear.
Every claim needs evidence, baseline, and confidence level.
Simple systems win: daily check-ins, weekly reviews, monthly resets.

starter_memory.content: Done means tests pass, logs are clean, and docs are updated.
Hypothesis -> method -> evidence -> decision -> next experiment.
Morning plan, midday check, evening reflection with captured learnings.
Track sleep, hydration, movement, and weekly trend notes.
Analyze thesis, valuation, risk, and clear invalidation points before action.

starter_tasks.title: Audit current CI and QA pipeline
starter_tasks.description: List missing tests, flaky checks, and deployment risks.

starter_tasks.title: Create release checklist v1
starter_tasks.description: Define pre-release validation, rollback steps, and ownership.

starter_tasks.title: Pick top 3 research hypotheses
starter_tasks.description: Rank by expected impact and feasibility.

starter_tasks.title: Create evidence capture template
starter_tasks.description: Standardize experiment logging for repeatable analysis.

starter_tasks.title: Map daily and weekly routines
starter_tasks.description: Capture mandatory habits and schedule anchors.

starter_tasks.title: Build life memory capture flow
starter_tasks.description: Define where and how important events are stored and reviewed.

starter_tasks.title: Set weekly health baselines
starter_tasks.description: Set baseline targets for sleep, hydration, and activity.

starter_tasks.title: Design health check-in ritual
starter_tasks.description: Create a recurring weekly health review process.

starter_tasks.title: Define watchlist and risk rules
starter_tasks.description: Set thesis, position sizing, and risk guardrails.

starter_tasks.title: Build weekly portfolio review loop
starter_tasks.description: Track portfolio health, thesis updates, and next actions.
